name: German (or Dutch) Babies
recipeIngredient: Ovenproof skillet(s), either one 12-inch or four 6-inch (pie or cake pans may be substituted)
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat the eggs until thoroughly mixed.
2. Add the milk and blend well.
3. Sift together flour and salt, then add slowly but continuously to the egg mixture, whisking as you do so.
4. Add the melted butter and whisk until the batter is smooth.
5. Pour into the prepared pan(s) or pans.
6. Bake at 450°F for 15 minutes.
7. The four small German babies will be done at this point. The one large one requires another 10 minutes of baking, with the oven reduced to 350°F.
8. Remove from the oven and sprinkle with lemon juice. Dust with confectioner's sugar before serving while hot.
